meta.title: OurCandle4U — Handmade candles & car rental
meta.description: Enjoyed your GoMore rental? Take a free handmade candle and optionally tip us toward our dream trip to Japan.

hero.badge: A little gift from your hosts
hero.title: Thanks for renting with us!
hero.subtitle: We left you a handmade candle — a small thank-you from Gabriele & partner, your GoMore hosts.

story.title: Why a candle?
story.paragraph1: We share our cars on GoMore and love keeping them spotless for every trip. As a little thank-you, we leave a handmade candle in each car — yours to keep!
story.paragraph2: We're saving up for a dream trip to Japan. If you enjoyed the ride (and the candle!), a voluntary TWINT tip helps us get one step closer. Every contribution counts.
story.paragraph3: No pressure at all — the candle is free. The tip is purely optional and goes straight toward our Japan adventure.

candle.title: Your handmade candle
candle.description: Each candle is made by hand with care. More colors and scents are available — perfect as a gift or to treat yourself.
candle.colorsNote: Ask us about other colors and special requests!

twint.title: Support our Japan dream
twint.description: Enjoyed the rental? A voluntary TWINT tip helps us with car cleaning and our trip to Japan.
twint.note: TWINT P2P only — enter the number manually in the app if it doesn't open automatically.

contact.title: Want more candles?
contact.description: Love your candle and want more colors or a custom order? Get in touch — we'd love to hear from you!
contact.gomore: Or message us on GoMore chat — you'll find us as your car hosts.

footer.tagline: Handmade candles · GoMore car rental · Japan dream
